info.title: OpenID Federation Entity Registry API
info.description: REST API for managing OpenID Federation entities, policies, modules, and trust marks. This API provides endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting federation entities, policies, trust anchors, resolvers, trust marks, and trust mark subjects.

tags.name: Pending registrations
tags.description: Operator view of incoming registration requests

tags.name: Registration Flow
tags.description: Configured pipeline steps for entity registration

tags.name: Join
tags.description: Apply to and manage federation membership

tags.name: Entities
tags.description: CRUD for federation, hosted and subordinate entities

tags.name: Trustmarks
tags.description: CRUD for trustmarks and trust mark subjects

delete.summary: Remove a specific flow from an intermediate

trustmarkType.description: Trustmark type that is a entityid

trustmarkId.description: Trustmarkid that this subject belongs to

revoked.description: If the trust mark is revoked for this subject

granted.description: Granted time in ISO-8601-format with offset, ex. 2025-03-12T14:37:00Z

expires.description: Expires time in ISO-8601-format with offset, ex. 2025-03-12T14:37:00Z

taImId.description: TaIm ID that this subordinate belongs to

jwks.example: JSON Web Key Set as string

ecLocation.description: ecLocation - location where the actual entity statement is placed. Expressed as a url. Ex https://my.company.se/entitystatement

ecLocationAutomaticResolve.description: When true, eclocation will be loaded from the hosted entity with the same issuer entityid

effectiveEcLocation.description: Effective EcLocation that is calculated serverside

metadataPolicy.description: Metadata policy for this subordinate statement. Optional. Must be valid JSON if provided.

entityId.description: Entity identifier that this trustmark issuer belongs to

active.description: If this trustmark issuer is active

trustMarkTokenValidityDuration.description: Trust mark token validity duration (ISO-8601 duration, e.g. PT1H)

entityId.description: Entity identifier that this trust anchor belongs to.

active.description: If this trust anchor is active

trustMarkIssuers.description: Entity identifiers for trust mark issuers

subordinates.description: List of subordinates for this trust anchor

entityId.description: Entity identifier that this module belongs to

active.description: If this resolver instance is active

trustAnchor.description: Trust anchor entityId that this resolver is connected to

trustedKeys.description: Trusted keys as JWKS JSON of the trust anchor

stepRetryDuration.description: Step retry duration (ISO-8601 duration, e.g. PT1H)

entityId.description: Entity identifier that this trust anchor belongs to.

subordinates.description: List of subordinates for this intermediate

effectiveEcLocation.description: Effective EcLocation that is calculated serverside

trustMarkSources.description: Trustmark sources that can be used to include trustmarks.

crit.example: The crit (critical) Claim indicates that extensions to the set of Claims specified for use in this type of JWT

authorityhints.example: An array of strings representing the Entity Identifiers of Intermediate Entities or Trust Anchors that are Immediate Superiors of the Entity. the set of Claims specified for use in this type of JWT

trustmarkId.description: Id of the trustmark to be included (entity identifier)

crit.example: The crit (critical) Claim indicates that extensions to the set of Claims specified for use in this type of JWT

authorityhints.example: An array of strings representing the Entity Identifiers of Intermediate Entities or Trust Anchors that are Immediate Superiors of the Entity. the set of Claims specified for use in this type of JWT

errorMessage.description: Error message explaining way entityconfiguration was not accessable

entityId.description: Entity identifier (URI) of the entity applying to join

registrationFlowId.description: ID of the registration flow (linked to an intermediate)

trustmarks.description: Trustmarks requested as part of this join application

trustmarkIssuer.description: Entity identifier of the trustmark issuer

registrationId.description: ID of the registration flow this entity joined through

tags.description: Tags describing the entity type, e.g. OIDC, SAML, RP, OP, IDP, SP

isHosted.description: True if the entity's metadata is hosted in this registry

hostedId.description: ID of the hosted entity record, present when isHosted is true

rejectionReason.description: Reason for rejection, present when status_fedreg is DENY

registrationFlowId.description: Registration flow used for this request

jwks.description: JWKS snapshot from entity configuration at time of registration

status.description: Current status of the registration request

reviewedAt.description: When the request was reviewed by an operator

reviewedBy.description: Identity of the operator who reviewed the request

rejectionReason.description: Reason provided by the operator when rejecting the request

trustmarkType.description: Trustmark type that is a entityid

trustmarkSubjects.description: List of trustmark subjects associated with this trustmark

federationEntity.description: Federation entity (if entity type is federation)

hostedEntity.description: Hosted entity (if entity type is hosted)

crit.example: The crit (critical) Claim indicates that extensions to the set of Claims specified for use in this type of JWT

authorityhints.example: An array of strings representing the Entity Identifiers of Intermediate Entities or Trust Anchors that are Immediate Superiors of the Entity. the set of Claims specified for use in this type of JWT

trustAnchor.description: Trust anchor module (if exists on federation entity)

intermediate.description: Intermediate module (if exists on federation entity)

trustmarkIssuer.description: Trustmark issuer module (if exists on entity)

registrationId.description: Registration flow ID (linked to an intermediate)

description.description: Description of the flow and its purpose

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from authentication endpoint

selectedOrgNumber.description: Organization number to use for the request. Enter your organization number here.
selectedOrgNumber.name: selected-org-number
